channel.title: Meridian Labs
channel.description: Open source tools for AI research and evaluation

item.title: Welcome to the Meridian Labs Blog
item.dc:creator: Meridian Labs
item.description:
We’re excited to launch the Meridian Labs blog. Here we’ll share updates on our open source tools for AI research and evaluation, insights from our work on model testing and agent behavior analysis, and perspectives on the evolving landscape of AI safety and evaluation.

Stay tuned for posts about Inspect AI, our platform for evaluating large language models, and our growing suite of tools for understanding AI systems.
